lines.text: (reading) We're putting the whole Unity Day artifact side under one office. One name on it. [pause] Somebody who closes a thing out without leaving a mess behind him.
That Nebraska recovery last month. Clean. No press, no lawsuit. [pause] Eleven years of that, Pell. This program wants exactly that kind of hand on it.
Special Administrator, Lunar Heritage Recovery. [pause] It's yours. Press'll want you out front on it, and you'll sign off on the Unity Day cargo yourself.
(to Marsh) Marsh. Your office want a piece of the roll—
[flatly] We're slammed clean through the quarter. Wish we could.

I have to say, thank you. [pause] Over on the continent they'd never leave a thing like this to a committee. You give it one owner and it quits drifting. They figured that out a long time ago over there.
(not looking up) [flatly] Good. Legal's got your paper outside. I've got Denver in five.
You won't have to check up on me, Director. [deliberate] I won't let the Accord down.
